feat: custom cottage-core theme with decorative SVG elements, animations, and DeepSource fixes (#72)

* Initial plan

* feat: add warm pastel cottage-core theme with animations

- Update globals.css with keyframe animations (fadeInUp, float, shimmer, etc.)
- Add warm pastel CSS custom properties and utility classes
- Add Nunito Google Font for handmade aesthetic
- Restyle Header with warm glassmorphism and pastel accents
- Restyle Hero with entrance animations and warm gradient CTAs
- Restyle ProductGrid with staggered card animations and warm borders
- Restyle Footer from dark to warm pastel gradient theme
- Update GradientButton and GradientHeading to warm color scheme
- Update About page with warm theme
- Update CSP to allow Google Fonts
- Update Hero tests for new CTA text and badge content

Co-authored-by: konarsubhojit <20913717+konarsubhojit@users.noreply.github.com>

* Apply warm pastel theme to all remaining page files

Update color classes across 22+ page files to use the warm pastel
theme with custom hex colors replacing the default blue/purple/gray
Tailwind palette. Changes include:

- Main backgrounds: bg-warm-gradient
- Section cards: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm with warm borders
- Headings: text-[#4a3728]
- Body text: text-[#7a6355]
- Secondary text: text-[#b89a85]
- Primary gradients: from-[#e8a87c] to-[#d4856b]
- Accent badges: bg-[#fde8d8] text-[#d4856b]
- Borders: border-[#f0d5c0]

Files changed: loading, error pages, blog, contact, press, careers,
help, shipping, returns, cart, orders, products (loading/error/detail),
auth (signin/register/error), and account pages.

Admin pages left unchanged as requested.

* fix: scalafmt lint failures and ZIO test class discovery error

- Run scalafmt on all source files to fix 5 misformatted files
  (scaladoc comment rewrapping to fill 120-column lines)
- Switch test module from mvnDeps to zioTestVersion so that
  zio-test-sbt goes via mandatoryMvnDeps (used by discoveredTestClasses
  class loader) instead of regular mvnDeps (compile-only)

Co-authored-by: DamianReeves <957246+DamianReeves@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: add ascribe.ScalaTests to test/itest modules for correct classpath setup

Test modules missing ScalaTests meant outer module reference (moduleDeps)
was not wired — ZTestFramework and other test jars never reached the
discoveredTestClasses URLClassLoader. Pattern confirmed from Mill 1.1.3
own examples: extends: [<parent>.ScalaTests, TestModule.Xxx] + explicit
mvnDeps (not zioTestVersion YAML key which is silently ignored).

Co-authored-by: DamianReeves <957246+DamianReeves@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: swap mssql/server for azure-sql-edge on ARM64 hosts

The Azure Service Bus emulator depends on SQL Server, which has no ARM64
image. On Apple Silicon (and other ARM64 hosts), the mssql/server:2022-latest
container fails under QEMU with jemalloc address mapping errors.

Use Aspire's BeforeStartEvent to intercept the container model and swap the
image to azure-sql-edge:latest, which has native ARM64 support. The Service
Bus emulator works with either SQL engine.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix memory leaks in TranscriptBuilder, TranscriptTextContent, and MainWindow

TranscriptBuilder: Track all PropertyChanged handlers subscribed on
ChatMessageViewModel in _pendingToolHandlers list. Unsubscribe all pending
handlers in ResetState() (called on every chat switch via Rebuild). Handlers
that complete naturally (tool status → Completed/Failed) also remove
themselves from the tracking list. Fixes 5 handler sites (todo, terminal,
generic tool, subagent, assistant streaming) that previously only
unsubscribed on completion — abandoned/in-progress tools leaked forever.

TranscriptTextContent: Add OnDetachedFromVisualTree to clear StrataMarkdown
content and null the Content property, allowing the child StrataMarkdown to
release its caches.

MainWindow: Track project filter bar PropertyChanged handlers and unsubscribe
all of them at the start of RebuildProjectFilterBar before subscribing new
ones. Add guard (_wiredVm) to prevent double-wiring event handlers if
OnDataContextChanged fires multiple times for the same ViewModel.
